title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.178 - Epilepsy Awareness Day designated for March 26
text:
9.178.  Epilepsy Awareness Day designated for March 26. — March twenty-sixth of each year is hereby designated as "Epilepsy Awareness Day".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate activities and events to increase awareness of epilepsy and its related symptoms.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738 § 12)
